info.name: Microsoft Azure PowerBIDedicated
info.description: PowerBI Dedicated Web API provides a RESTful set of web services that enables users to create, retrieve, update, and delete Power BI dedicated capacities

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbidedicated Capacities Dedicatedcapacityname Suspend

variable.description: (Required) A unique identifier for a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the Azure Resource group of which a given PowerBIDedicated capacity is part. This name must be at least 1 character in length, and no more than 90.
(Required) The name of the Dedicated capacity. It must be at least 3 characters in length, and no more than 63.

request.description: Suspends operation of the specified dedicated capacity instance.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

request.description: Resumes operation of the specified Dedicated capacity instance.
